scripts.install: if [ "$IS_FRONTEND" = "true" ]; then cd client && npm install; else cd server && npm install; fi
scripts.build: if [ "$IS_FRONTEND" = "true" ]; then cd client && npm run build; else cd server && npm run build; fi
scripts.start: if [ "$IS_FRONTEND" = "true" ]; then node client/server.js; else cd server && npm start; fi
